common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

errorPage.title: This page didn't load
errorPage.description: Something went wrong on our end. You can try refreshing or head back home.

verifyEmailBanner.sentToast: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

hero.subtitle: Rally is the easiest way to organize running races, group rides and community gatherings. Set up an event, open registrations and manage the whole day from a single dashboard.
hero.imageAlt: Runners racing along a coastal road at dawn

eventTypes.title: Built for every kind of gathering
eventTypes.subtitle: Whether it's a competitive race or a relaxed weekend meetup, Rally has you covered.

features.title: Everything you need to run a great event
features.subtitle: From the first registration to the finish line, Rally handles the logistics so you can focus on the experience.

setup.title: Set up in minutes
setup.desc: Create an event with date, route, capacity and pricing through a guided flow.

registrations.title: Registrations & tickets
registrations.desc: Free or paid sign-ups with capacity limits, waitlists and instant confirmations.

routes.title: Routes & maps
routes.desc: Share start points, distances and elevation so participants know what to expect.

updates.title: Updates that land
updates.desc: Notify everyone about schedule changes, weather, or last-minute details.

dashboard.title: Live dashboard
dashboard.desc: Track sign-ups and attendance in real time from one clean overview.

results.title: Results & community
results.desc: Post results, celebrate finishers, and keep your people coming back.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Every event starts as a free draft. When you're ready to open registrations, pick a plan based on how many people you expect — that's what you pay to publish.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Go from idea to a fully managed event in three simple steps.

create.title: Create your event
create.desc: Add details, route and registration settings.

share.title: Share the link
share.desc: Promote it and let people sign up in seconds.

run.title: Run the day
run.desc: Manage check-ins, updates and results in one place.

cta.title: Ready to rally your community?
cta.subtitle: Create your first event today. It's free to get started.

brand.subtitle: Set up races, rides and gatherings, open registrations and manage the whole day from one dashboard.

auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not yet available. Please use email & password.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a link to reset your password. It expires in 2 hours.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

verifyEmail.successBody: Your email address has been confirmed.
verifyEmail.errorBody: This verification link is no longer valid. Sign in and request a new one.

eventsList.subtitle: From casual weekend rides to full-distance races, every event below is organized by real people in your community. Browse what's coming up, check the details that matter — date, location, price and format — and register in seconds. No account needed to look around.

realDates.title: Real dates, real capacity
realDates.desc: Every listing shows the actual date, location and spots available — no guesswork.

community.title: Run by your community
community.desc: Events here are organized by real people — local clubs, teams and organizers, not brands.

registerFast.title: Register in seconds
registerFast.desc: Pick an event, sign up, and get your confirmation instantly. No back-and-forth required.

eventsList.emptyAll: No upcoming events yet. Check back soon!
eventsList.emptyCategory: No events in this category right now.

eventDetail.notFound: This event could not be found.
eventDetail.selectTypePricing: Select your type to see pricing
eventDetail.payInstantly: Pay instantly by KHQR after you register.
eventDetail.optionsAvailable_one: {{count}} option available — you can select multiple.
eventDetail.optionsAvailable_other: {{count}} options available — you can select multiple.
eventDetail.signInPrompt: Sign in to register for this event.
eventDetail.shareDesc: Scan the QR code to open this page, or download it to share on posters and social media.
eventDetail.toastUnpaid: You're registered — complete payment to secure your spot.
eventDetail.toastPaid: You're registered! Add the event to your calendar.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage the events you host and the ones you've joined.
dashboard.emptyParticipatingDesc: Browse events and register to see them here.
dashboard.eventsError: Couldn't load your events. Check that the backend is running and up to date (pending migrations?), then refresh.
dashboard.emptyCreatedDesc: Host your first race, ride or gathering.

manageEvent.loadErrorGeneric: Something went wrong talking to the API. Check that the backend is running and up to date (pending migrations?), then try again.
manageEvent.deleteDialogDesc: This permanently removes the event and all registrations. This cannot be undone.
manageEvent.publishDesc: This event is a draft — only you can see it. Pick a plan to open registrations. Your plan sets how many people can register.
manageEvent.combinedCapacityPrefix: Your event types add up to
manageEvent.combinedCapacitySuffix: people combined — pick a plan with at least that much capacity.
manageEvent.tooSmall: Too small for your event types
manageEvent.noParticipants: No one has registered yet. Share your event to get sign-ups.
manageEvent.qrDesc: Share this so people can scan and go straight to the registration page. The color follows your brand color below.
manageEvent.brandingDesc: Update the look of your public event page.

eventForm.title: Create an event
eventForm.subtitle: Fill in the details and save it as a draft. You'll pick a plan — which sets your registrant capacity — and publish from the event page.
eventForm.descPlaceholder: Route, what to bring, start line details…
eventForm.capacityNote: Registrant capacity isn't set here — you'll choose a pricing plan (which includes a capacity limit) when you publish this event from its management page.
eventForm.brandingDesc: Personalize your event with a color, banner, and logo.
eventForm.eventTypesDesc: Let participants choose between different options (e.g. 5km, 10km, marathon).
eventForm.surveyDesc: Ask participants questions when they sign up.
eventForm.toastDraftSaved: Draft saved — pick a plan to publish it.
eventForm.errorEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time

profile.title: Your profile
profile.basicInfoDesc: This is what participants and other organizers see.
profile.connectSuffix: merchant account so payments from people registering for your events go straight to you. Until you connect one, registration payments are collected through Rally's default account.
profile.apiKeySavedPlaceholder: Saved: {{masked}} — leave blank to keep it
profile.apiKeyNote: Stored encrypted. We never show the full key again once it's saved.

surveyBuilder.question: Question
surveyBuilder.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What is your experience level?

surveyForm.subtitle: Please answer the questions below to complete your registration.

eventTypeSelector.title: Choose your type(s)
eventTypeSelector.subtitle: Select one or more options to register for.

paymentPanel.paymentStatusMessage: This payment was {{status}}. You can try again.
paymentPanel.scanInstructions: Scan with ABA Mobile or any KHQR banking app
paymentPanel.autoConfirmNote: We'll confirm automatically once payment is received — no need to refresh.

planPaymentPanel.nowVisible: It's now visible on the public events page.
planPaymentPanel.autoPublishNote: We'll publish your event automatically once payment is received.

eventQrCode.scanToRegister: Scan to register for this event
